ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used in the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "training_data_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training data version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_label" INTEGER /* Label of the class */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the class belongs to */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the metric belongs to */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the class */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the class */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the class */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support for the class */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_dataset" TEXT /* Dataset used for evaluation */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project or model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project or model was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project or model was accessed */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed during access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "version_change_log" TEXT /* Changes made in the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
